PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-18-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed. The will dated January 22, 2004 is admitted to Probate. Steven Stroppiana is appointed as the administrator of the estate with will annexed with full authority. Bond is set at $1,000,000.00 despite the petitioner's request for waiver of bond because the will does not waive bond for the proposed personal representative. Isidoor Bornstein is the appointed probate referee. A hearing is set for May 21, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The personal representative shall file either a petition for an order for final distribution of the estate, or a report of status of administration in compliance with Probate Code 12200 two weeks before the hearing date.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported.
